outputs.name: dst
outputs.desc: Destination rows with copied feature slice

constraints.notes: Copies a contiguous source row into a feature-axis slice of a wider destination row.

impl.c_declaration: void feature_slice_copy(const float *src, float *dst, int rows, int src_dim, int dst_dim, int dst_feature_offset);

notes: Generic row-wise feature slice copy used for branch collect/stitch lowering.
